ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for each user */,
  "password_digest" TEXT /* Encrypted password for user authentication */,
  "active_after" TEXT /* Date after which the user account is active */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset requests */,
  "password_reset_sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the password reset token was sent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., Administrator, Member) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  "street_1" TEXT /* First line of the user's address */,
  "street_2" TEXT /* Second line of the user's address (if any) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user's residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user's residence */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the user's residence */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the user's address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the user's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is locked */,
  "last_password_change_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Alternative email for notifications */,
  "notification_phone" TEXT /* Alternative phone number for notifications */,
  "is_two_factor_auth_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "two_factor_auth_secret" TEXT /* Secret for two-factor authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the password reset */,
  "token" TEXT /* Token generated for password reset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset request was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset token expires */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reset token has been used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the reset request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, profile update, password change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_book" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the address is associated */,
  "street_1" TEXT /* First line of the street address */,
  "street_2" TEXT /* Second line of the street address (optional) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the address was created */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary address for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_book_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the login attempt was successful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the login attempt occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (e.g., city, country) of the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session expires */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was created */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
